displaySummary.zh: 以棋牌游戏为试验场：搜索、学习与规划的演进
displaySummary.en: Game AI as a Testbed for Search, Learning and Planning

displayDescription.zh: 时序差分学习为强化学习提供了一种从经验中学习预测的紧凑方法。TD 方法不必等到最终结果，而是用下一步奖励和下一步预测来更新价值估计。这种自举思想支撑了 TD-Gammon、Q-learning 和 actor-critic 等后续算法。
displayDescription.en: Temporal-difference learning gave reinforcement learning a compact way to learn predictions from experience. Instead of waiting for a final outcome, TD methods update value estimates using the next reward and the next prediction. This bootstrapping idea sits behind many later algorithms, including TD-Gammon, Q-learning, and actor-critic methods.

title.en: Learning to predict by temporal differences

description.zh: TD 学习经典 Machine Learning 论文记录。

description.zh: 用于展示延迟奖励中价值估计变化的棋盘轨迹快速播放槽位。

usage.zh: 可播放的棋局状态演化模块

html.zh: 从延迟奖励中学习需要一种在整个回合结束前分配信用的方法。
html.en: Learning from delayed rewards required a way to assign credit before the entire episode ended.

html.zh: TD 比较当前预测与“奖励加下一步预测”，再把当前价值向该目标推进。
html.en: TD compares the current prediction with a reward plus the next prediction, then nudges the current value toward that target.

html.zh: 专家通常把时序差分学习视为强化学习的基石。它的长期影响在于提出价值估计可以从后续预测中自举学习，并支撑了 Q-learning、actor-critic 方法和现代基于价值的控制。
html.en: Experts generally treat temporal-difference learning as a cornerstone of reinforcement learning. Its long-term legacy is the bootstrapping idea that value estimates can learn from later predictions, supporting Q-learning, actor-critic methods, and modern value-based control.

notes.zh: 由 legacy generated milestone 批量生成的 variant；展示层默认不覆盖 legacy。
notes.en: Variant batch-generated from the generated legacy milestone; presentation does not override legacy by default.
